title: DeathCoordinates
description: A simple mod that shows your coordinates when you die.
body:
DeathCoordinates
![DeathCoordinates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c626d55662de3c6028eadb384f1872a098654945_0.webp) **DeathCoordinates** is a Minecraft mod that helps you easily view and use your death location. - When you die, coordinates, world, and Click TP text are shown in the chat - Clicking the coordinates copies them - Clicking Click TP teleports you to your death location - Coordinates and world are displayed on the death screen - The settings menu can be opened with the default V key - Chat messages and death screen messages can be enabled or disabled separately - ModMenu support is available.
